relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: A messenger descends with abyss-key and chain.
The ancient accuser is bound for symbolic thousand years.
Deception is restrained for a season.
Witnesses who refused beast-allegiance live and reign with Messiah.
The second death has no authority over the holy ones.
After the thousand years, deception is briefly released.
Gog and Magog gather as old enemy-symbols.
The beloved city is surrounded, but the threat ends.
The deceiver joins beastly power in final judgment.
A great white throne appears; old heaven and earth flee.
The dead stand, scrolls open, and works are revealed.
Sea, Death, and Hades give up the dead.
Death and Hades are cast away: second death.
The scroll of life is the final boundary.

contemplative_note: Revelation 20 is the unmasking of deception and the end of Death itself. The vision is symbolic judgment, not timeline obsession.
